question.label: Needed to change
question.name: When you say 'what needed to change' — what felt unclear to you?
question.description: Clarifies the specific expectations or signals he felt he was missing after the decision.

answer: I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.

assessment.note: He narrowed his response to what felt controllable, which signals strong lack of clarity about what would actually change the outcome; also hints at a growth concern.

new_queue.label: Decision meaning
new_queue.name: What did you take away from the conversation about the promotion decision?

new_queue.label: Path forward
new_queue.name: What path forward feels real to you from here?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help this feel more workable over the next couple of weeks?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
